reference: My son has been on the Enfamil Newborn formula, and he is about to turn four months old. He does not poop regularly, and I feel like it is the formula, but I am not sure what to switch to since he has to soon anyway. He has some gas, and it does not look like the less pooping is bothering him, but I know he should be pooping more than he is. We tried Gerber Gentle, and he hated it. I am thinking about Similac, but I am just not sure. Any suggestions?
